title: The Honor of the Press
writer: John T. Neville, Michael L. Simmons, J.K. Foster
actors: Edward J. Nugent, Rita La Roy, Dorothy Gulliver
plot: Cub reporter Daniel Greely gets a job on a big city newspaper. A string of robberies occur and the owner of the paper blames the police for not rounding up the crooks. Daniel discovers that a coded message in the newspaper's edito...
